name: Bankas2026
observations: Children's summer camp website for Baptistkyrkan Sundsvall & Bilda
Five full-screen slides with illustrations and hidden mini-games
All user-facing content in Swedish
Stack: React 19, TypeScript 6, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS v4, Biome
Package manager: pnpm
Color palette: Rose Pine Dawn + earth/edge-light tokens
Fonts: Nunito (body), Playwrite Ireland (display)
No router - useState<SlideId> drives navigation
Slides: front, welcome, info, program, contact
Uses OpenSpec workflow for change tracking
Hosted on GitHub Pages
Biome is the only linter/formatter, no ESLint/Prettier
verbatimModuleSyntax on - use import type for type-only imports
Tailwind v4 config in CSS @theme block, not JS
Peter prefers to run builds himself - never run pnpm build autonomously

name: SlideShellNav
observations: Completed and archived as 2026-04-13-slide-shell-nav
Slide.tsx layout shell with content (flex-1) and picture (flex-shrink-0) slots
dipFrom uses double-rAF technique for correct mount animation
dipToActive is explicit boolean prop managed by App.tsx to prevent flash on new slide mount
SlideNav desktop dock uses JS proximity scaling with cosine falloff, no translateY
Mobile nav has back/next arrows + map button in bottom-right
MobileMapOverlay uses lg-* images (200x200, 240x146) with liquid glass backdrop
4 placeholder slide components in folder-per-slide structure
